tasks.title: Analyze docs/plan/plan-engine.md for core requirements and architecture
tasks.description: Read and analyze the entire docs/plan/plan-engine.md file to extract core requirements, design principles, user profile data needs, and architectural guidelines for the IELTS Journey Study Plan Engine. Document key points including primary objectives, core design principles, required user profile data, and constraints.
acceptanceCriteria: Extracted core requirements and design principles documented
User profile data inputs identified
Constraints and non-functional requirements noted
tasks.expectedResult: A detailed summary document or notes capturing the core requirements and architecture from plan-engine.md

outputPlan.description: Summary of core requirements and architecture extracted from plan-engine.md

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational understanding for implementation tasks

tasks.title: Design module structure and interfaces for Study Plan Engine
tasks.description: Based on the analysis of plan-engine.md, design the module structure, core interfaces, and data models for the Study Plan Engine. Define TypeScript interfaces for user profile input, study tasks, roadmap data, and AI integration points. Create a design document describing module boundaries, responsibilities, and interaction patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: Module structure diagram or description created
TypeScript interfaces for core data models defined
Design document created describing module responsibilities and interactions
tasks.expectedResult: A design document and TypeScript interface definitions for the Study Plan Engine modules and data models

outputPlan.description: Design document for Study Plan Engine module structure and interfaces
TypeScript interfaces and types for Study Plan Engine inputs and outputs

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Establishes the blueprint for coding the Study Plan Engine

tasks.title: Implement core Study Plan Engine class with deterministic scheduling logic
tasks.description: Implement the core StudyPlanEngine class in packages/learning-engine/src/daily-plan/DailyPlanEngine.ts. This class must implement deterministic scheduling logic that respects user profile data, study time availability, exam date, and prioritizes weak skills. It must never schedule more study time than available or after the exam date. Include methods for plan generation, validation, and adaptation to missed tasks or profile changes.
acceptanceCriteria: StudyPlanEngine class implemented with deterministic scheduling
Methods for generating, validating, and adapting plans exist
No scheduling beyond user available time or exam date
tasks.expectedResult: A fully implemented StudyPlanEngine class with deterministic scheduling logic and unit tests

outputPlan.description: Core Study Plan Engine implementation with deterministic scheduling
Unit tests for StudyPlanEngine class

metadata.inputContext: Requires design document and types.ts interfaces
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the core deterministic scheduling logic for the study plan

tasks.title: Implement AI orchestration layer for plan enhancement
tasks.description: Implement AI orchestration in packages/learning-engine/src/daily-plan/AiPlanOrchestrator.ts that integrates with the core StudyPlanEngine. This layer must handle batched AI calls for plan enrichment, ensure strict structured schema usage, handle failures gracefully with fallback to deterministic plan, and support explainability. It must not control dates or scheduling but provide content suggestions and explanations.
acceptanceCriteria: AI orchestration implemented with batched calls
Strict schema validation of AI output
Graceful fallback to deterministic plan on AI failure
Explainability support included
tasks.expectedResult: AI orchestration layer implemented with tests and fallback mechanisms

outputPlan.description: AI orchestration layer for plan enrichment
Unit tests for AI orchestration layer

metadata.inputContext: Requires StudyPlanEngine implementation and AI provider abstraction
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables AI-enhanced plan content while preserving deterministic scheduling

tasks.title: Implement plan persistence and validation with IndexedDB/Dexie
tasks.description: Implement plan persistence and validation logic in packages/learning-engine/src/daily-plan/PlanPersistenceService.ts using IndexedDB/Dexie. This service must save generated plans, validate and repair plans before persistence, preserve completed learning history during regeneration, and support local-first operation without backend dependency.
acceptanceCriteria: Plan persistence implemented using IndexedDB/Dexie
Validation and repair logic included before saving
Completed learning history preserved on regeneration
Local-first operation supported
tasks.expectedResult: Plan persistence service implemented with validation and tests

outputPlan.description: Plan persistence and validation service using IndexedDB/Dexie
Unit tests for plan persistence service

metadata.inputContext: Requires StudyPlanEngine implementation and IndexedDB/Dexie usage knowledge
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures reliable local storage and integrity of generated plans

tasks.title: Implement plan regeneration and adaptation logic
tasks.description: Implement logic in packages/learning-engine/src/daily-plan/PlanRegenerator.ts to support plan regeneration and adaptation when user misses tasks, changes profile, schedule, target, or exam date. This module must preserve completed tasks, adjust scheduling accordingly, and maintain plan validity and explainability.
acceptanceCriteria: Plan regeneration logic implemented with adaptation to user changes
Completed tasks preserved during regeneration
Plan remains valid and explainable after regeneration
tasks.expectedResult: Plan regeneration and adaptation module implemented with tests

outputPlan.description: Plan regeneration and adaptation logic
Unit tests for plan regeneration logic

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables dynamic plan updates preserving user progress and validity

tasks.title: Integrate Study Plan Engine with user profile and learning data
tasks.description: Implement integration code in packages/learning-engine/src/daily-plan/PlanEngineIntegration.ts that consumes user profile data, learning progress, and preferences from existing services (e.g., learningProfileRepository.ts). Ensure the Study Plan Engine uses real user data for plan generation and adaptation.
acceptanceCriteria: Integration module implemented to fetch and supply user profile and learning data
Study Plan Engine consumes real user data for plan generation
No hardcoded profile values or dates used
tasks.expectedResult: Integration module implemented with tests ensuring real user data usage

outputPlan.description: Integration layer for Study Plan Engine with user profile and learning data
Unit tests for integration module

metadata.inputContext: Requires knowledge of user profile data structures and StudyPlanEngine API
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures Study Plan Engine uses accurate user data for personalized plans

tasks.title: Implement explainability and user feedback mechanisms
tasks.description: Implement explainability features in packages/learning-engine/src/daily-plan/ExplainabilityService.ts that provide users with clear reasons why the plan was generated in a certain way. Include methods to generate user-friendly explanations for task scheduling, prioritization, and adaptation decisions. Integrate with AI outputs and deterministic logic explanations.
acceptanceCriteria: Explainability service implemented with methods to generate user-friendly explanations
Integration with AI and deterministic logic explanations
Explanations cover task scheduling, prioritization, and adaptation
tasks.expectedResult: Explainability service implemented with tests and integrated explanations

outputPlan.description: Service providing user-friendly explanations for plan generation
Unit tests for explainability service

metadata.inputContext: Requires AI orchestration and StudyPlanEngine logic
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves user trust and understanding of the generated study plan

tasks.title: Create comprehensive unit and integration tests for Study Plan Engine
tasks.description: Develop comprehensive unit and integration tests covering all modules of the Study Plan Engine including deterministic scheduling, AI orchestration, persistence, regeneration, integration, and explainability. Ensure coverage of edge cases such as missing AI key, missed tasks, profile changes, and no AI fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover all core modules and edge cases
Integration tests validate end-to-end plan generation and adaptation
Tests verify fallback behavior when AI is unavailable
tasks.expectedResult: Comprehensive test suite ensuring robustness and correctness of Study Plan Engine

outputPlan.description: Add additional unit tests for edge cases
Add tests for AI fallback and batching
Add tests for validation and repair
Add tests for regeneration scenarios
Add integration tests for user data consumption
Add tests for explanation generation

metadata.inputContext: Requires all Study Plan Engine modules implemented
evidence: Test coverage report shows high coverage
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures quality and reliability of the Study Plan Engine implementation

tasks.title: Document Study Plan Engine usage and architecture
tasks.description: Create detailed documentation in docs/plan/study-plan-engine.md describing the architecture, usage, API, and integration points of the new IELTS Journey Study Plan Engine. Include explanations of core design principles, module responsibilities, data flow, AI integration, persistence, and adaptation features.
acceptanceCriteria: Documentation covers architecture and module descriptions
Usage instructions and API details included
Integration and AI orchestration explained
tasks.expectedResult: Comprehensive documentation file for the Study Plan Engine

outputPlan.description: Documentation of Study Plan Engine architecture and usage

metadata.inputContext: Requires completed implementation and design documents
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides users and developers with clear understanding of the Study Plan Engine
